passives.name: Grievous Wounds
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemy champions inflicts them with {{tip|Grievous Wounds}} for 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Magic damage to enemy champions applies Grievous Wounds for 3 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: magic damage dealt to an enemy champion applies Grievous Wounds for 3 seconds and refreshes on subsequent qualifying hits.
Player-visible behavior: Grievous Wounds applies even when the triggering damage event is fully absorbed by a shield.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Oblivion Orb
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Grievous Wounds trigger scope, duration, and shield-interaction behavior
